args.Description: "Replace the settings portal layout with beautiful, dark-themed, and responsive styles that conform strictly to coinpulse-DESIGN.md, fixing blinding white button fallbacks by replacing uncompiled tailwind utility classes with custom CSS variables and inline styles."
